parameters.query: Resources | where subscriptionId in~ ('44444444-4444-4444-4444-444444444444', '55555555-5555-5555-5555-555555555555', '66666666-6666-6666-6666-666666666666') | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses' | where isnull(properties.ipConfiguration) | where isnull(properties.natGateway) | project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, skuName=tostring(sku.name), allocationMethod=tostring(properties.publicIPAllocationMethod), ipConfigurationId=tostring(properties.ipConfiguration.id), natGatewayId=tostring(properties.natGateway.id)
